login.header-description: Enter your email and password to login to your account

registration.header-description: Enter your email and password to register
registration.no-data: Need a password and an email address

auth-schema.length: Password must be at least 8 characters

auth-schema.lowercase: Password must contain one lowercase letter
auth-schema.special-symbol: Password must contain one special symbol
